props.name: children
props.description: The content to be displayed inside the gradient text.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds custom classes to the root element for additional styling.

props.name: colors
props.description: Array of colors for the gradient effect.

props.name: animationSpeed
props.description: Duration of one animation cycle in seconds.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Pauses the animation when hovering over the text.

props.name: yoyo
props.description: Reverses animation direction at the end instead of looping.

props.name: showBorder
props.description: Displays a gradient border around the text.
